column1: User Story 1: User Registration
column2:
User Story 1: User Registration
• User Story: As a regular user,
I want to register in the system,
So that I can create an account and access personalized features.
column3:
Scenario: User registers in the system
  Given a regular user is on the registration page
  When the user submits valid registration details
  Then the user should be registered successfully

column1: User Story 2: User Login
column2:

column3:
Scenario: Regular user logs in to access their account
  Given a regular user is on the login page
  When the user enters valid credentials
  And the user clicks the login button
  Then the user should be redirected to their account dashboard

column1: User Story 3: Fill in Preferences Profile
column2:
User Story 3: Fill in Preferences Profile
• User Story: As a regular user,
I want to fill in my preferences profile (genres, favorite movies,
directors),
so that the system can provide me with suggestions for movies that are more appropriate to my tastes.
column3:
Scenario: Fill in preferences profile to receive tailored movie suggestions
  Given a regular user is logged into the system
  When the user fills in their preferences profile with genres, favorite movies, and directors
  Then the system should save the user's preferences
  And the system should provide movie suggestions based on the user's preferences

column1: User Story 4: View Movie Suggestions
column2:

column3:

  Then the user should see a list of movie suggestions relevant to their preferences

column1: User Story 5: Rate Watched Movies
column2:
User Story 5: Rate Watched Movies

I want to rate the movies I’ve watched,

column3:
Scenario: Rate a watched movie

  When the user rates the movie
  Then the rating is recorded

column1: User Story 6: Commenting on Movies I've Watched
column2:

column3:

So I can share my opinion with other users and see what they think.
column3:
Scenario: Commenting on a watched movie
  Given a regular user has watched a movie
  And the user is logged into their account
  When the user submits a comment on the movie
  Then the comment should be visible under the movie's comments section
  And other users should be able to see the comment

column1: User Story 7: Mark Movies as "To Watch"
column2:
User Story 7: Mark Movies as "To Watch"
- As a regular user,
I want to save movies to my "To Watch" list,
so that I can organize the movies I want to watch in the future.
column3:
Scenario: Save a movie to the "To Watch" list
  Given a regular user is logged into the movie app
  And the user is on the movie details page
  When the user clicks the "Add to To Watch" button
  Then the movie should be added to the user's "To Watch" list
  And the user should see a confirmation message

column1: User Story 8: Mark Movies as "Watched"
column2:
User Story 8: Mark Movies as "Watched"
- As a regular user,
I want to mark movies as "Watched",
so that the system stops recommending me movies that I've already watched and keeps a history of what I've watched.
column3:
Scenario: Mark a movie as "Watched"
  Given a regular user is logged in
  And the user has a list of movies
  When the user marks a movie as "Watched"
  Then the movie should be marked as "Watched" in the system
  And the movie should no longer be recommended to the user
  And the movie should be added to the user's watched history

column1: User Story 9: Get Personalized Recommendations
column2:
User Story 9: Get Personalized Recommendations
- As a regular user, I want to get personalized recommendations based on my viewing history and preferences,
so that I can discover movies that really interest me.
column3:
Scenario: Get personalized movie recommendations
  Given a regular user with a viewing history and preferences
  When the user requests personalized recommendations
  Then the user should receive a list of recommended movies
  And the recommendations should be based on the user's viewing history and preferences

column1: User Story 10: Search for Specific Movies
column2:
User Story 10: Search for Specific Movies
- As a regular user,
I want to search for specific movies or by genre,
So that I can quickly find movies that I'm already interested in watching.
column3:
Scenario: Search for specific movies by title or genre
  Given a regular user is on the movie search page
  When the user searches for a movie by title or genre
  Then the user should see a list of movies matching the search criteria
  And the user should be able to select a movie from the list

column1: User Story 11: Edit Profile Preferences
column2:
User Story 11: Edit Profile Preferences
- As a regular user,
I want to edit my movie and director preferences,
so that I can adjust my recommendations as my tastes change.
column3:
Scenario: Edit movie and director preferences
  Given a regular user is logged in
  And the user is on the profile preferences page
  When the user updates their movie and director preferences
  Then the user's preferences should be saved
  And the recommendations should be adjusted based on the new preferences

column1: User Story 12: Get Notifications for New Releases
column2:
User Story 12: Get Notifications for New Releases
- As a regular user,
I want to get notifications for new movie releases on my profile,
So that I can stay updated about new movies according to my interests.
column3:
Scenario: Regular user receives notifications for new movie releases
  Given a regular user is logged into their profile
  And the user has set their movie interests
  When a new movie is released
  Then the user should receive a notification about the new release
  And the notification should match the user's interests

column1: User Story 13: Filter Recommendations by Category
column2:
User Story 13: Filter Recommendations by Category
As a regular user,
I want to filter recommendations by categories such as genre or rating,
So that I can view only the types of movies I want to watch at a given time.
column3:
Scenario: Filter recommendations by category
  Given a regular user is on the recommendations page
  And the user sees a list of movie recommendations
  When the user selects a category filter such as genre or rating
  Then the recommendations should be filtered to show only movies that match the selected category

column1: User Story 14: View Movie Details
column2:
User Story 14: View Movie Details
- As a regular user,
I want to view full details of a recommended movie (synopsis, cast, trailer),
so that I can decide whether to watch it or not.
column3:
Scenario: View full details of a recommended movie
  Given a regular user is on the movie recommendations page
  When the user selects a recommended movie
  Then the user should see the movie synopsis
  And the user should see the cast details
  And the user should see the movie trailer

column1: User Story 15: Favorite Movies
column2:
User Story 15: Favorite Movies

I want to favorite specific movies,

column3:

column1: User Story 3: Customize Preferences
column2:

I want to set preferences for family and kids movies,
so that I can receive appropriate recommendations to watch with my kids..

  And the parent should receive appropriate movie recommendations for family and kids

  And other users should be able to see the rating and comment

column2:

I want to set age-based content restrictions,
